zh.lifeSummary: 當Jean or John de Montfort IV於1339年8月24日出生在法國布列塔尼莫比韓薩索奧時，他的父親Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort45歲，母親Jeanne de Flandres44歲。他於1386年11月9日與Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarre在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可南斯結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1399年11月9日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可南斯享年60歲，埋葬在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可南斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Jean or John de Montfort IV于1339年8月24日出生在法国布列塔尼莫比韓薩索奧时，他的父亲Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort45岁，母亲Jeanne de Flandres44岁。他于1386年11月9日与Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarre在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可南斯结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1399年11月9日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可南斯享年60岁，埋葬在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易洛易-阿特藍可南斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Jean
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Like Jane and Joan , a medieval variant of Old French Je(h)anne. Towards the end of the Middle Ages this form became largely confined to Scotland. In the 20th century it became more widely used in the English-speaking world and enjoyed a period of great popularity, but it is now out of fashion. Among numerous well-known and influential bearers are the British novelists Jean Plaidy ( Eleanor Hibbert , 1910–93 ) and Jean Rhys ( Ella Gwendolen Rees Williams , 1894–1979 ), British actress Jean Simmons ( 1929–2010 ), and American-born actress Jean Seberg ( 1938–79 ). It is also found as a variant spelling of the masculine name Gene .

variants.name: John
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

variants.name: Jeane
meanings: Variant spelling of   Jean .

nameMeanings.name: or
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

variants.name: Thor
meanings: Originally the name of the god of thunder in Norse mythology, Thor (Old Norse Þórr). It was not used as a personal name during the Middle Ages. The modern name is either a late 18th-century revival of the god's name or else a vernacular development of Tord .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament: ‘God is gracious’. See John .

en.lifeSummary: When Jean or John de Montfort IV was born on 24 August 1339, in Sarzeau, Morbihan, Brittany, France, his father, Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort, was 45 and his mother, Jeanne de Flandres, was 44. He married Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarre on 9 November 1386, in Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 9 November 1399, in Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 60, and was buried in Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Jean or John de Montfort IV est né le 24 août 1339, à Sarzeau, Morbihan, Bretagne, France, son père, Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Jeanne de Flandres, avait 44 ans. Il a épousé Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarre le 9 novembre 1386, à Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 9 novembre 1399, à Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 60 ans, et a été enterré à Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Jean or John de Montfort IV am 24. August 1339 in Sarzeau, Morbihan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort 45 und seine Mutter Jeanne de Flandres 44. Er hat am 9. November 1386 in Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 9. November 1399 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Jean or John de Montfort IV è nato il il 24 agosto 1339 nel Sarzeau, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Jeanne de Flandres, aveva 44 anni. Lui sposato Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarre il 9 novembre 1386, nel Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 9 novembre 1399, nel Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 60 anni, e fu sepolto a Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Jean or John de Montfort IVが1339年8月24日にフランスブレタグンモービハンサルズエアウで生まれた時，父Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfortは45歳，母Jeanne de Flandresは44歳であった。1386年11月9日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーロイアーエ-アトランティクナンツでJeanne D'Evreux-Navarreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1399年11月9日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーロイアーエ-アトランティクナンツで60歳で死去し，フランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーロイアーエ-アトランティクナンツにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Jean or John de Montfort IV(이)가 1339년 8월 24일 프랑스 브레타그니 모르비핸 사르즈이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Jeanne de Flandres(은)는 44세였다. 그는 1386년 11월 9일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 난츠에서 Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1399년 11월 9일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 난츠에서 60세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 로이레-앳랜티크 난츠에 묻혔다.

pt.24 August 1339–9 November 1399: 24 de agosto de 1339–9 de novembro de 1399

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Jean or John de Montfort IV nasceu em 24 de agosto de 1339, em Sarzeau, Morbihan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Jeanne de Flandres, tinha 44 anos. Ele casou-se com Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarre em 9 de novembro de 1386, em Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 9 de novembro de 1399, em Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, França, com 60 anos, e foi sepultado em Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Jean or John de Montfort IV родился 24 августа 1339 г. в местности сарзо, морбихань, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Jeanne de Flandres, 44. Он женился на женщине по имени Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarre 9 ноября 1386 г. в местности нантесь, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 9 ноября 1399 г. в местности нантесь, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 60 лет и был похоронен в местности нантесь, лоире-атлантику, пеис де ла лоир, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Jean or John de Montfort IV nació el 24 de agosto de 1339, en Sarzeau, Morbihan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Jean de Montfort Comte de Montfort, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Jeanne de Flandres, tenía 44 años. Se casó con Jeanne D'Evreux-Navarre el 9 de noviembre de 1386, en Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 9 de noviembre de 1399, en Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 60 años, y fue sepultado en Nantes, Loire-Atlantique, Pays de la Loire, Francia.
